race.comment: NASEBAH (10) scratched from Rosehill last Saturday to be saved for this. Made her Australian debut with a slick win along the inside to clear out for a dominant performance over 1800m at Randwick Kensington in BM64 grade. Well placed with Grima's 2kg claim and will handle the steep rise in grade. Tongue-tie goes on from the inside draw. BIRD WHISTLE (8) kept fresh for this after dropping in grade for a tough on-pace victory over 1600m at Scone. Held in high regard by the stable and will take catching in this deeper field. AMREEKIYAH (5) returned from a let-up with a slashing third from near last on the bend over 1700m at Scone in this grade. Best form puts her right in this on the firmer surface. JUST GLAMOUROUS (6) talented mare at her top for this. Ready for the 1600m after running fourth over 1400m at this track. Adept in all conditions and gets her chance. DANCES WITH HOOVES (9) will get back in the run and hope they overdo it up front. Keep safe.
